title: Al Dhow Group
description: ***.com zoominfo.com/c/al-dhow/345585723 Dhow International Holding is a diversified group of companies with a portfolio spanning high-growth and high-impact industries across the GCC region.Their extensive operations encompass a wide range of sectors, including engineering, architectural solutions, hospitality, food & beverage, logistics, healthcare, and venture capital. The group is committed to delivering integrated, end-to-end services while fostering long-term sustainable growth across all its businesses
